semanticTypes.name: MemberEmail
semanticTypes.$comment: Client-supplied email address that identifies a workspace member. Minted by the caller when invoking addMember (body.email); planner generates a deterministic value at that site. The WorkspaceMemberMembership edge binding on removeMember resolves the path-param email from the same minted value.

semanticTypes.name: CatalogAssetKey
semanticTypes.$comment: Key identifying an ingested catalog asset. Derived from the element template's `id` field in the fixture file. Client-minted because ingestCatalogAssets returns 204 (no response body). Override at runtime via POS_FIXTURE_CATALOG_ASSET_KEY.
